title: UNESCO–CENIA Partnership Promotes Ethical AI in Education Across Latin America
description: UNESCO Regional Office in Santiago and the National Centre for Artificial Intelligence (CENIA) signed a cooperation agreement to promote the responsible use of artificial intelligence in education across Chile and Latin America.

reporting_brief.WHO: UNESCO Regional Office Santiago, CENIA (National Centre for Artificial Intelligence - Chile), Ministries of Education across Latin America, educators, policymakers
reporting_brief.WHAT: UNESCO-CENIA partnership signed February 2026; Latam-GPT (region's first open LLM for Latin America/Caribbean) integrated into UNESCO's Regional Observatory on AI in Education; training programs for educators, professionals, policymakers
reporting_brief.WHY: AI integration in education requires ethical, inclusive, rights-based frameworks; need for capacity building and responsible innovation across developing Latin American education systems
reporting_brief.WHEN: Partnership signed February 2026; training programs launching 2026
reporting_brief.CONTEXT: Part of broader UNESCO commitment to ethical AI governance; aligns with UNESCO Recommendation on Ethics of AI; focus on transparency, inclusion, human rights; multi-stakeholder dialogue to strengthen regional innovation ecosystems

PERSPECTIVES.position: Ethical AI in education critical for sustainable development; partnership model key for capacity building in developing regions
Latin America needs regional solutions for AI; local LLM (Latam-GPT) better serves regional needs than global platforms
Need for technology transfer and training; concern about digital equity and access to AI tools

reporting_brief.SUGGESTED_ANGLE: Latin America's AI Declaration: Why UNESCO and CENIA Built a Local Alternative to Global AI Models

중요성과 배경

AI integration in education requires ethical, inclusive, rights-based frameworks; need for capacity building and responsible innovation across developing Latin American education systems Part of broader UNESCO commitment to ethical AI governance; aligns with UNESCO Recommendation on Ethics of AI; focus on transparency, inclusion, human rights; multi-stakeholder dialogue to strengthen regional innovation ecosystems 이는 교육 생태계 전체에 중요한 영향을 미칠 것으로 예상됩니다.

전망과 의의

Partnership signed February 2026; training programs launching 2026을 시점으로, Part of broader UNESCO commitment to ethical AI governance; aligns with UNESCO Recommendation on Ethics of AI; focus on transparency, inclusion, human rights; multi-stakeholder dialogue to strengthen regional innovation ecosystems 이러한 움직임이 얼마나 효과적으로 실행되고 평가될지가 향후 교육 정책의 방향을 결정하게 될 것입니다.

"교육 정책의 변화 - 이는 향후 교육 체계에 중요한 영향을 미칠 것으로 보입니다."
